person.name: Edmund Ferrers
person.alternateName: Edmund de Ferrers, 6th Baron Ferrers of Chartley

memoryArtifacts.headline: Inquisitions Post Mortem (IPMs) for Edmund Ferrers of Chartley, knight

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Edmund de Ferrers, 6th Baron Ferrers of Chartley (1386-1435) was the son of Robert de Ferrers, 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley and Margaret Le Despenser - a daughter of Edward le Despencer, 1st Baron le Despencer.

He inherited the title of Baron Ferrers of Chartley upon his father's death in 1413 but was never summoned to parliament.

Edmund fought in most of the great victories of King Henry V including the Battle of Agincourt and married Helen, daughter and co-heir of Thomas de la Roche, by whom he acquired large landed possessions, amongst which was that of Castle Bromwich in the county of Warwickshire.

The couple had two sons, Edmund (to whom his estates were entailed) and William who became William, 7th Baron Ferrers of Chartley as well as one daughter Margaret de Ferrers who married John Beauchamp, 1st Baron Beauchamp of Powick becoming Lady Beaucamp of Powick.

Edmund de Ferrers, 6th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, died aged 49 in 1435.

«b»Biography«/b»
Sir Edmund Ferrers, 6th Baron Chartley was born circa 1387 at of Chartley, Staffordshire, England; Age 26 in 1413. He married Ellen de la Roche, daughter of Thomas de la Roche, Lord Roche and Elizabeth Bermingham, circa 1410; They had 5 sons (Sir William; Sir Edmund; Henry, a clerk; Richard; & Edward) and 2 daughters (Margaret, wife of Sir John, 1st Lord Beauchamp of Powick; & Joan, wife of John, 5th Lord Clinton). Sir Edmund Ferrers, 6th Baron Chartley died on 17 December 1435.

Father: Sir Robert Ferrers, 5th Baron Chartley b. 31 Oct 1359, d. 12 Mar 1413

Mother: Margaret le Despenser b. c 1366, d. 3 Nov 1415

Wife: Ellen de la Roche b. c 1390, d. 4 Nov 1440

«b»Children«/b»
1.) Sir William Ferrers, 7th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, b. c 1412, d. 9 Jun 1450

2.) Margaret Ferrers, b. c 1414

3.) Joan Ferrers, b. c 1416, d. 1458

4.) Richard Ferrers, b. c 1424

5.) Edmund (Edward) Ferrers, b. 1428

6.) Henry Ferrers, b. c 1430, d. 12 Apr 1486

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Ferrers於1386年出生在英國斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素時，他的父親Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley28歲，母親Margaret Despenser22歲。他於1412年11月與Elene de la Roche在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1435年12月17日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯度維-比-哈特利享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Ferrers was born in 1386, in Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, his father, Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Despenser, was 22. He married Elene de la Roche in November 1412, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 17 December 1435, in Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Ferrers est né en 1386, à Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Despenser, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elene de la Roche en novembre 1412, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 décembre 1435, à Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Ferrers 1386 in Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Despenser 22. Er hat im November 1412 in England, United Kingdom Elene de la Roche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Dezember 1435 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Ferrers è nato il nel 1386 nel Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Despenser, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elene de la Roche nel novembre 1412, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 dicembre 1435, nel Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Ferrersが1386年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチャートリー カストルで生まれた時，父Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartleyは28歳，母Margaret Despenserは22歳であった。1412年11月にイギリスイギリスでElene de la Rocheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1435年12月17日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアストウエ-ブイ-チャートリーで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Ferrers(이)가 1386년 영국 스태퍼드실르 처틀리 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Despenser(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1412년 11월 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elene de la Roche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년 12월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스타우-비-처틀리에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Ferrers nasceu em 1386, em Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Despenser, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elene de la Roche em novembro de 1412, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de dezembro de 1435, em Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Ferrers родился в 1386 г. в местности чартли кастл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Despenser, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elene de la Roche ноябрь 1412 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 декабря 1435 г. в местности стоуе-би-чартли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.

Se casó con Elene de la Roche en noviembre de 1412, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas.
